summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: P0 ID verification fix, new workflow (Add items → Confirm Order → Payment), CEO Users tab CRUD, and module access enforcement. All features working correctly.

issues: HTML validation warning: span cannot be child of option/select - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React console shows HTML nesting warning (span inside select/option) - cosmetic issue only
seed_data_creation: Test users created via CEO panel (auto-deleted after tests), test table sessions created
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working: 1) P0 ID verification bug FIXED - items now add successfully after confirming modal. 2) New workflow (Cancel/Confirm Order → Payment screen with Pay Here/Pay at Register/Back to items) working in both TABLE and TAP modules. 3) CEO Users tab fully functional with Create/Read/Update/Delete operations. 4) CEO Companies tab shows module toggles (PULSE, TAP, TABLE, KDS). 5) Module access enforcement via /api/venue/check-module endpoint working. PostgreSQL is now running via supervisor.

table_module.id_verification_flow: VERIFIED - Modal appears for alcohol items, checkbox + confirm button adds item successfully, ID verified badge appears
table_module.new_workflow: VERIFIED - Cancel Order + Confirm Order buttons visible after adding items, clicking Confirm shows Pay Here/Pay at Register/Back to items

tap_module.guest_confirmation: VERIFIED - Modal prompts to confirm guest before proceeding
tap_module.new_workflow: VERIFIED - Same Cancel Order/Confirm Order → Payment flow as Table module

ceo_module.users_tab: VERIFIED - User list displayed, New User form with Email/Password/Role fields, Edit/Delete icons for each user
ceo_module.companies_tab: VERIFIED - Companies list, module toggles visible (PULSE, TAP, TABLE, KDS checkmarks)
ceo_module.company_health: VERIFIED - KPI cards (MRR, Gross Revenue, Net Profit, Active Companies, Active Venues, Churn Rate, Activation Rate, Avg Rev/Company)

verified_features.module_access_enforcement: VERIFIED - /api/venue/check-module/{module_key} endpoint returns allowed:true/false based on venue_configs.modules
